name: H2O XGBoost
description: XGBoost is a supervised learning algorithm that implements a process called boosting to yield accurate models.
input: It takes in a two DataFrame as input, one is for train and other one is for validation.

fields.name: isResponseIsCategorical
fields.title: Is Response Column Categorical
fields.description: Set to 'true' for Classification (categorical target) or 'false' for Regression (numeric target).

fields.name: withContributions
fields.title: With Contributions
fields.description: If true, calculate Shapley values (feature contributions) for each prediction.

fields.name: labelCol
fields.title: Label Column
fields.description: The target column to be predicted.

fields.name: featuresCols
fields.title: Feature Columns
fields.description: The set of predictor columns used to train the model.

fields.name: columnsToCategorical
fields.title: Columns to Categorical
fields.description: Numeric or String columns that should be treated as categorical factors/enums.

fields.name: path
fields.title: Path
fields.description: File path to save the generated confusion matrix.

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Seed for reproducibility. Use -1 for a random seed.

fields.name: splitRatio
fields.title: Split Ratio
fields.description: Fraction of data used for training (e.g., 0.8 for 80%).

fields.name: nfolds
fields.title: Number of Folds
fields.description: Folds for cross-validation. Set to 0 to disable, or >= 2 to enable.

fields.name: ntrees
fields.title: Number of Trees
fields.description: Total number of boosting iterations (trees). More trees increase complexity.

fields.name: maxDepth
fields.title: Max Depth
fields.description: Maximum tree depth. Deeper trees capture more detail but may overfit.

fields.name: minRows
fields.title: Min Rows
fields.description: Fewest allowed (weighted) observations in a leaf node.

fields.name: maxBins
fields.title: Max Bins
fields.description: Maximum number of bins for histogram construction (used only if Tree Method is 'hist').

fields.name: maxLeaves
fields.title: Max Leaves
fields.description: Maximum number of leaves allowed (used only if Tree Method is 'hist'). 0 means no limit.

fields.name: treeMethod
fields.title: Tree Method
fields.description: Algorithm construction method. 'hist' is recommended for very large datasets.

fields.name: growPolicy
fields.title: Grow Policy
fields.description: Determines how new nodes are added to the tree.

fields.name: booster
fields.title: Booster
fields.description: The booster type to use. 'gbtree' is standard; 'dart' handles dropout.

fields.name: eta
fields.title: Eta
fields.description: Learning rate (shrinkage) used in update to prevent overfitting.

fields.name: sampleRate
fields.title: Sample Rate
fields.description: Fraction of rows to sample for each tree.

fields.name: categoricalEncoding
fields.title: Categorical Encoding
fields.description: Encoding scheme for handling categorical features.

fields.name: ignoreConstCols
fields.title: Ignore Const Columns
fields.description: Whether to discard constant columns (columns with only one unique value).

fields.name: scoreEachIteration
fields.title: Score Each Iteration
fields.description: Enable to score the model after every boosting iteration.

fields.name: stoppingRounds
fields.title: Stopping Rounds
fields.description: Stop training if the metric doesn't improve for N rounds. 0 to disable.

fields.name: maxRuntimeSecs
fields.title: Max Runtime Secs
fields.description: Maximum time allowed for model training in seconds. 0 means no limit.

fields.name: stoppingMetric
fields.title: Stopping Metric
fields.description: Metric to monitor for early stopping (e.g., AUC for classification).

fields.name: stoppingTolerance
fields.title: Stopping Tolerance
fields.description: Relative tolerance for metric improvement.

fields.name: gainsliftBins
fields.title: Gains Lift Bins
fields.description: Number of bins for Gains/Lift table. -1 for automatic binning.

fields.name: convertUnknownCategoricalLevelsToNa
fields.title: Convert Unknown Categorical Levels to NA
fields.description: Convert new categorical levels encountered during prediction to NAs.

fields.name: withLeafNodeAssignments
fields.title: With Node Assignments
fields.description: If true, returns the leaf node indices for each prediction.

fields.name: withStageResults
fields.title: With Stage Results
fields.description: If true, returns predictions for every boosting stage.

fields.name: minChildWeight
fields.title: Min Child Weight
fields.description: Minimum sum of instance weight (hessian) needed in a child. Higher values prevent overfitting.

fields.name: learnRate
fields.title: Learn Rate
fields.description: Step size shrinkage (same as Eta).

fields.name: subsample
fields.title: Sample Rate
fields.description: Row sample rate per tree (same as Sample Rate).

fields.name: colSampleRate
fields.title: Column Sample Rate
fields.description: Fraction of columns to sample per tree.

fields.name: colSampleByLevel
fields.title: Column Sample By Level
fields.description: Subsample ratio of columns for each level.

fields.name: colSampleRatePerTree
fields.title: Column Sample Rate Per Tree
fields.description: Subsample ratio of columns for each tree.

fields.name: colSampleByTree
fields.title: Column Sample By Tree
fields.description: Same as colSampleRatePerTree.

fields.name: colSampleByNode
fields.title: Column Sample By Node
fields.description: Subsample ratio of columns for each node split.

fields.name: maxAbsLeafnodePred
fields.title: Max Absolute Leaf Node Prediction
fields.description: Maximum absolute value of a leaf node prediction. 0 is unlimited.

fields.name: maxDeltaStep
fields.title: Max Delta Step
fields.description: Limits the maximum step each tree’s weight estimation can take. Useful for imbalanced classes.

fields.name: scoreTreeInterval
fields.title: Score Tree Interval
fields.description: Score every N trees. 0 disables this.

fields.name: minSplitImprovement
fields.title: Minimum Split Improvement
fields.description: Minimum loss reduction required to make a further partition on a leaf node.

fields.name: gamma
fields.title: Gamma
fields.description: Same as Minimum Split Improvement.

fields.name: nthreads
fields.title: Number of Threads
fields.description: Threads to use. -1 defaults to maximum available.

fields.name: buildTreeOneNode
fields.title: Build tree one node
fields.description: Forces the tree building to run on a single node (not distributed).

fields.name: calibrateModel
fields.title: Calibrate Model
fields.description: Use Platt Scaling to calibrate class probabilities for better estimates.

fields.name: regLambda
fields.title: Reg Lambda
fields.description: L2 regularization term on weights.

fields.name: regAlpha
fields.title: Reg Alpha
fields.description: L1 regularization term on weights.

fields.name: quietMode
fields.title: Quiet mode
fields.description: Enable to reduce log output during training.

fields.name: sampleType
fields.title: Sample Type
fields.description: For DART booster: Choose row sampling algorithm.

fields.name: normalizeType
fields.title: Normalize Type
fields.description: For DART booster: Normalization method for new trees.

fields.name: rateDrop
fields.title: Rate Drop
fields.description: For DART booster: Dropout rate (0 to 1).

fields.name: oneDrop
fields.title: One Drop
fields.description: For DART booster: If true, at least one tree is always dropped.

fields.name: skipDrop
fields.title: Skip Drop
fields.description: For DART booster: Probability of skipping dropout during iteration.

fields.name: dmatrixType
fields.title: Dmatrix Type
fields.description: Storage type for training data. 'sparse' is efficient for datasets with many zeros.

fields.name: scalePosWeight
fields.title: Scaled Pos Weight
fields.description: Controls the weight of positive vs negative examples (useful for imbalance).

fields.name: keepCrossValidationModels
fields.title: Keep Cross Validation Models
fields.description: Set to false to save memory by not keeping individual CV models.

fields.name: keepCrossValidationPredictions
fields.title: Keep Cross Validation Predictions
fields.description: Required to be true for building Stacked Ensembles later.

fields.name: keepCrossValidationFoldAssignment
fields.title: Keep Cross Validation Fold Assignment
fields.description: Whether to keep fold index assignments for each row.

fields.name: distribution
fields.title: Distribution
fields.description: Loss function distribution (e.g., bernoulli for binary classification).

fields.name: tweediePower
fields.title: Tweedie Power
fields.description: Power parameter for Tweedie regression (between 1 and 2).

fields.name: quantileAlpha
fields.title: Quantile Alhpa
fields.description: Target quantile for Quantile regression (0 to 1).

fields.name: huberAlpha
fields.title: Huber Alpha
fields.description: Quantile threshold for Huber loss (0 to 1).

fields.name: weightCol
fields.title: Weight Column
fields.description: Column containing row weights.

fields.name: offsetCol
fields.title: Offset Column
fields.description: Column added directly to the linear predictor.

fields.name: foldCol
fields.title: Fold Column
fields.description: Column containing cross-validation fold assignments.

fields.name: foldAssignment
fields.title: Fold Assignment
fields.description: CV fold logic. 'Stratified' is best for imbalanced classification.

fields.name: aucType
fields.title: AUC Type
fields.description: Calculation method for multinomial AUC.

fields.name: output_confusion_matrix_chart
fields.title: Output Confusion Matrix Chart
fields.description: Enable to visualize predicted vs actual class heatmap.

fields.name: cm_chart_title
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Title
fields.description: Chart title name.

fields.name: cm_chart_description
fields.value: Visual Representation of Predicted vs. Actual Classes
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Chart Description
fields.description: Detailed description for the chart.

fields.name: confusionMatrixTargetLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Target Legend
fields.description: Legend label for Target.

fields.name: confusionMatrixPredictedLabelLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Predicted Label Legend
fields.description: Legend label for Predicted Label.

fields.name: confusionMatrixCountLegend
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Count Legend
fields.description: Legend label for Count.

fields.name: confusionMatrixRowDescription
fields.title: Confusion Matrix Outcome description
fields.description: Provide business context for the individual rows of the confusion matrix.

fields.name: output_roc_curve
fields.title: Output ROC Curve
fields.description: Enable to display the ROC curve chart.

fields.name: roc_title
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Title
fields.description: ROC chart title.

fields.name: roc_description
fields.title: ROC Curve Chart Description
fields.description: Summary of the ROC chart.

fields.name: xlabel
fields.title: X Label
fields.description: X-axis label.

fields.name: ylabel
fields.title: Y Label
fields.description: Y-axis label.

fields.name: paramKeys
fields.title: Param Name
fields.description: Select the hyperparameters to tune.

fields.name: paramValues
fields.title: Param Value
fields.description: Enter comma-separated values for the selected keys.

fields.name: gridStrategy
fields.title: Grid Search Strategy
fields.description: 'Cartesian' tests every combination. 'RandomDiscrete' stops after a specific limit.

fields.name: gridMaxModels
fields.title: Grid Max Models
fields.description: Limits total models in RandomDiscrete search. 0 means no limit.

fields.name: gridMaxRuntimeSecs
fields.title: Grid Max Runtime Seconds
fields.description: Limits search time in seconds. 0 means no limit.

fields.name: gridStoppingRounds
fields.title: Grid Stopping Rounds
fields.description: Stops grid search if performance doesn't improve for N rounds.

fields.name: gridStoppingTolerance
fields.title: Grid Stopping Tolerance
fields.description: The minimum improvement required to continue searching.

fields.name: gridStoppingMetric
fields.title: Grid Stopping Metric
fields.description: The metric used to determine if the grid search should stop early.

fields.name: gridParallelism
fields.title: Grid Parallelism
fields.description: Number of models to train in parallel during search.

fields.name: gridSelectBestModelBy
fields.title: Grid Select Best Model By
fields.description: Metric used to choose the winner. Example: 'AUC' for classification models.
